title: Assassin (disambiguation)
content:
'''Assassin''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Assassin]]''', a hired killer
*'''[[Assassin droid]]s''', [[droid]]s programmed as assassins
**'''[[SD-K4 assassin droid]]''', [[droid]]'s used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]
***'''[[SD-K4a mini-assassin droid]]''', [[droid]]'s used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]
*'''[[Sith assassin]]s''', assassins who worked for the [[Sith]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Assassin/Legends|Assassin]]''', a hired killer
*'''[[Assassin (Imperial-class)|''Assassin'']]''', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]
*'''''[[Assassin 1]]''''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]
*'''[[Assassin droid/Legends|Assassin droid]]''', a term for [[Droid/Legends|droids]] programmed as assassins
**'[[Assassin probe/Legends|''Assassin probes''']], a model of assassin droid used in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*'''[[Assassin sect]]''', a group in the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]]
*'''[[Clone assassin|Clone assassins]]''', [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] specially trained to kill Jedi
*'''[[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|CR92a ''Assassin''-class corvette]]''', an armed upgrade of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]
*'''[[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassins]]''', [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]] trained to capture or kill [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]

==Real life==
*"'''[[Assassin (episode)|Assassin]]'''", an episode of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'',
